name: nlp
description: Recruiter persona (Alex). vLLM Llama-3.1-8B fine-tune (fintuned_v4_AiRecruter) + Qwen2.5-1.5B response scorer + Qwen2.5-1.5B question refiner + Kokoro TTS, with sentence-level streaming audio.

capabilities.name: generate_question
capabilities.description: Produce the next interview question. Decides follow-up vs new topic, refines for depth/specificity, returns text + WAV audio.

capabilities.name: analyze_response
capabilities.description: Lightweight depth/quality analysis of a candidate answer.
